pre_game.message: Hey, I’m B. It’s a bit intense in here with everyone waiting for the game to start, isn't it? What brings you here today?
Hey B, I'm D. It definitely feels a bit high-stakes in here. I'm just here to win some money for my family, to be honest. What about you?
Same here, honestly. I’m determined to win this for my loved ones and to get myself on better footing. It’s good to meet someone with their priorities straight.
I feel that. It definitely keeps you focused when you're doing it for more than just yourself. Any idea what we should expect once things actually kick off?
I’m not entirely sure, but I’m expecting some kind of test of trust or a tough decision on how to split the pot. I guess we’ll find out soon enough.
That makes sense. If it does come down to trust, I hope we can find some common ground—it'd be better for everyone to walk away with something.
I’m with you on that. Cooperation is usually the smartest play if we want to make sure we actually bring something home. I'm definitely open to it.
Exactly. It’s better to have a guaranteed slice than nothing at all. Glad we're on the same page.
Agreed. Let's stick to that plan and make sure we both walk away with something.
Sounds like a plan. I'm going to go see what some of the others are thinking. Catch you later.
For sure, good luck with the others and I'll see you when the game starts.

post_game.message: I'm really glad we all stuck to the fair share of $10,000. It's great to see such perfect cooperation!
I completely agree. It's great when everyone is on the same page and we can achieve a fair result like this. Cooperation was definitely the key.
